headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Climbs 13.7% on Goldman Sachs Upbeat Stance
summary: Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) is one of the 10 Stocks With Insane Returns Right Now. Enphase Energy rebounded by 13.67 percent on Wednesday to close at $53.15 apiece, as investors cheered Goldman Sachs’ reaffirmation of a bullish stance for its stock and raising of its price target by double-digits. In a market note, Goldman Sachs […]

headline: PFF’s $14 Billion Preferred Stock Strategy Holds 60 Percent Bank Issued Preferreds With Call Provisions That Cap Your Upside
summary: Income investors who bought the iShares Preferred and Income Securities ETF (NASDAQ:PFF) for its distribution yield near 6.5% are sitting on a structural feature most never modeled: roughly 60% to 70% of PFF’s portfolio comes from U.S. banks and insurers, and almost all carry call provisions. PFF works fine when rates rise. The problem surfaces ... PFF’s $14 Billion Preferred Stock Strategy Holds 60 Percent Bank Issued Preferreds With Call Provisions That Cap Your Upside

headline: Bausch + Lomb to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference
summary: VAUGHAN, Ontario, May 21, 2026--Bausch + Lomb Corporation (NYSE/TSX: BLCO), a leading global eye health company dedicated to helping people see better to live better, today announced that Chairman and CEO Brent Saunders and Chief Medical Officer and Head of Research and Development Yehia Hashad, MD, will participate in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami, FL, on Tuesday, June 9, 2026, at 1:20 p.m. ET.

content.title: Bausch + Lomb to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference
